name: CalciMedica Inc. Common Stock
summary: CalciMedica Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing novel therapies for severe inflammatory and autoimmune diseases by targeting calcium release-activated calcium (CRAC) channels. The company's lead product candidate, Auxora, is being developed for acute pancreatitis and other indications. CalciMedica is headquartered in La Jolla, California.
